description: Task dependency graph. Copy to <project>/.claude/agents/dependency_graph.json and populate with project tasks.

rules.parallel_execution: Tasks are parallel-safe only if they have no shared depends_on AND no file ownership overlap.
rules.serial_execution: If task A blocks task B, B cannot start until A status is 'completed'.
rules.ui_gate: If ui_acceptance_required is true, task stays in 'review' until user approves.
rules.reason: More than 3 agents creates coordination overhead that exceeds time savings.
